name: Trail of Angels
short_description: "Trail of Angels" is a virtual reality journey that explores deep themes of human existence, the nature of the world and the essence of being, brought to life through the captivating works of renowned artist, composer and abstract art pioneer Mikalojus Ciurlionis.
detailed_description:
"Trail of Angels" is an extraordinary experience and a transformative VR journey that delves into profound themes of human existence, the nature of the world, and the essence of being, all brought to life through the captivating works of renowned artist, composer, and visionary who merged symbolism, music, and early abstraction, Mikalojus Ciurlionis.

Debuting at the Venice Film Festival and winner of the prestigious Lumen Prize for Art and Technology, Trail of Angels uniquely combines art, music and emotional storytelling to create an immersive experience.

Join us to embark on this unique VR journey that invites reflection, exploration, and emotional resonance. Embark on an unforgettable journey through his mesmerizing works and explore the depths of his artistic vision in a captivating virtual reality experience that resonates with emotion and beauty. Don't miss your chance to engage with art in a revolutionary way!

Experience "Trail of Angels" – Where Art Meets Virtual Reality! 

Creators: Director Kristina Buožytė, Producer Vitalijus Žukas
